description: Format the clinical demographics table in /home/ga/Documents/draft_demographics.docx to meet academic publication standards in LibreOffice Writer. The table must feature a multi-level header with 'Placebo (N=142)' spanning the Placebo Mean/SD columns and 'Sarilumab (N=138)' spanning the Sarilumab Mean/SD columns. Ensure all numerical data in the Mean, SD, and P-value columns are aligned by decimal point. Apply APA-style formatting by removing vertical borders and using appropriate horizontal lines (thick top/bottom borders and a thin line under header rows). Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/table1_final.docx.
